notes: Client/site type for a Property (distinct from PropertyProfile.property_type, which is the operator-asserted regulatory/marketing type like affordable/senior). This drives terminology, which knowledge bases Content Intelligence uses, which connectors are offered, and how Nora frames answers. Vocabulary-in-JSON: add a type here (plus its KB files) with no migration.

multifamily_apartment.label: Multifamily apartment
multifamily_apartment.description: A single apartment community leasing units to residents.

housing_authority.label: Housing authority
housing_authority.description: A public housing authority or nonprofit administering programs (vouchers, public housing, rental/homeownership assistance) across developments.
